channel.title: MoZhu_Blog
channel.description: MoZhu_Blog is a Notion-powered static blog project.

item.title: Notion Publishing Workflow
item.description: A sample article that explains how content moves from Notion into the generated static site.

item.title: Welcome to MoZhu_Blog
item.description: A sample post that shows the minimum frontmatter required by the static blog build pipeline.
